text: What a profound threshold you've crossed. There is something quietly astonishing about it: that an ordinary day should arrive carrying a person who did not exist before, and that you, of all people, should be the one entrusted to meet them. I imagine you are tired in ways you couldn't have rehearsed, and tender in ways you couldn't have predicted. Congratulations, truly. You have begun the long, unglamorous, luminous work of loving someone into being. Few labors matter more, and I can think of no one better suited to it.
